    • Class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession

      class GameSession extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • gameState
          GameState gameState
        • humanPlayer
          HumanPlayer humanPlayer
        • humanTurn
          boolean humanTurn
        • machinePlayer
          MachinePlayer machinePlayer
        • shotHistory
          LinkedList<Shot> shotHistory
          Ordered history of every shot fired in the match, used to reconstruct the visual board state after loading a saved game. LinkedList is chosen here to satisfy the project's requirement for four distinct non-array data structures; it gives O(1) append (the only operation needed during play) and preserves insertion order for replay.

  • Package com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy

    • Class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy.RandomHuntStrategy

      class RandomHuntStrategy extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • huntQueue
          Deque<Coordinate> huntQueue
          Candidate cells to try while in hunt mode. Using an ArrayDeque gives O(1) add/poll at both ends and counts as one of the four required non-array data structures.
        • random
          Random random
